name: Goetic seal invocation: the 72 seals of the Ars Goetia, each a sigil binding a specific spirit. FSPLIT: the magician inscribes the seal, splitting the spirit's essence from the void into constrained manifestation within the triangle of art. FFUSE: the license to depart reconstitutes the spirit back into the void — the seal is broken. VINIT: blank parchment. TANCH: the protective circle. AFWD: conjuration (spirit appears). AREV: license to depart (spirit dissipates). ENGAGR: the spirit is simultaneously bound (in the triangle) and free (its nature cannot be constrained) — the paradox of invocation.

phase_0.domain_name: Goetic seal invocation: the 72 seals of the Ars Goetia, each a sigil binding a specific spirit. FSPLIT: the magician inscribes the seal, splitting the spirit's essence from the void into constrained manifestation within the triangle of art. FFUSE: the license to depart reconstitutes the spirit back into the void — the seal is broken. VINIT: blank parchment. TANCH: the protective circle. AFWD: conjuration (spirit appears). AREV: license to depart (spirit dissipates). ENGAGR: the spirit is simultaneously bound (in the triangle) and free (its nature cannot be constrained) — the paradox of invocation.
phase_0.boundary_condition: the protective circle that contains and delimits the entire invocation

VINIT.justification: the void/uninitialized state before any sigil is inscribed or spirit named

TANCH.justification: the closed boundary that contains the whole system and prevents escape

AFWD.justification: forward morphism: the directed transformation that brings the spirit into manifestation

AREV.justification: reverse/descent morphism: the directed transformation that sends the spirit back to the void

CLINK.chosen_element: the sequence of conjuration followed by license to depart
CLINK.justification: composition: chaining the forward and reverse morphisms into a complete ritual cycle

IMSCRIB.chosen_element: the magician's will as the self that recognizes and names the spirit
IMSCRIB.justification: identity/self-reference: the magician's conscious self that remains constant throughout the operation

FSPLIT.justification: co-multiplication: the spirit's essence is split from the void into a constrained manifestation within the triangle of art

FFUSE.justification: multiplication: the spirit's essence is reconstituted back into the void, recovering the original unmanifest state

EVALT.justification: affirmative/success state: the invocation achieves its intended result

EVALF.chosen_element: the spirit does not appear or is hostile
EVALF.justification: negative/failure state: the invocation fails or backfires

ENGAGR.chosen_element: the spirit simultaneously bound in the triangle and free in its nature
ENGAGR.justification: paradox: the spirit is both constrained and unconstrained, the core paradox of invocation

IFIX.justification: permanent irreversible record: the seal, once drawn, is a fixed mark that cannot be undone except by breaking

phase_2.split_input: the spirit's essence in the void (unmanifest)
split_outputs: the spirit's essence in the void (unmanifest)
the spirit's essence manifested in the triangle
phase_2.fuse_result: the spirit's essence in the void (unmanifest)

phase_3.void_description: the unmanifest void before any invocation begins
phase_3.true_description: the spirit appears and obeys (successful invocation)
phase_3.false_description: the spirit does not appear or is hostile (failed invocation)
phase_3.both_description: the spirit is simultaneously bound and free (paradox of invocation)

steps.domain_action: Step 1 IMSCRIB: the magician recognizes their own will as the center of the operation
Step 2 AREV: the magician descends into the void, calling the spirit's name
Step 3 FSPLIT: the magician inscribes the seal, splitting the spirit's essence into manifestation
Step 4 AFWD: the magician performs the conjuration, bringing the spirit forward into the triangle
Step 5 FFUSE: the magician grants the license to depart, fusing the spirit back into the void
Step 6 CLINK: the magician composes the entire ritual sequence into a coherent whole
Step 7 IFIX: the magician records the outcome in the grimoire or memory
Step 8 IMSCRIB: the magician closes the circle, recognizing the self unchanged

phase_5.compiler_frontend: the magician's will and ritual instructions that translate intention into action
phase_5.ipc_mechanism: the sigil and spoken names that communicate between the magician and the spirit
phase_5.memory_mechanism: the grimoire or the magician's memory that stores the seal and outcome
phase_5.scheduler_mechanism: the planetary hours and astrological timing that determine when operations occur
phase_5.alfs_store: the Ars Goetia itself as the canonical reference for the 72 seals

phase_6.cycle_cost: the magician's focused will and energy expended per ritual cycle
phase_6.pre_cycle_state: the system state before invocation: void, circle drawn, parchment blank
phase_6.post_cycle_state: the system state after invocation: spirit returned to void, seal broken or retained
phase_6.delta_s_verdict: ΔS ≈ 0 — the cycle returns the spirit to the same unmanifest state, conserving the overall spiritual entropy
